decisions.decision: No spaces in image filenames — sanitise on import
decisions.why: Spaces break browser image loading. Replace spaces with dashes before committing. Check with `find . -name "* *"`

decisions.decision: All changes go to main directly for existing pages; feature branch only for NEW suburb pages awaiting approval
decisions.why: Keeps one deploy path clean. feature/suburb-pages for unreleased work only

decisions.decision: Photo selection formula: 1) GPS match first 2) match system type 3) free choice only if no GPS match. NEVER use wrong-suburb geotagged photo
decisions.why: GPS tags visible to customers, wrong suburb = credibility damage

decisions.decision: Full photo GPS map at dev/seo/photo-gps-map.md — check before every suburb page
decisions.why: All 59 geotagged photos mapped to nearest suburb with distances

decisions.decision: Vercel deploy: production domain on 'frontend' project, must use `vercel --prod` from frontend/ dir. GitHub auto-deploy goes to wrong project (nbhw/nbhw-ywbg)
decisions.why: Custom domain points to 'frontend' Vercel project, not the GitHub-linked ones

failures.title: [DEPLOY] Spaces in image filenames break on Vercel/browsers
failures.lesson: NEVER commit image files with spaces in filenames. Always sanitise on import: replace spaces with dashes. Check new images with `find . -name "* *"` before committing.

failures.title: [DEPLOY] Photo moved to /used/ broke live page reference
failures.lesson: Never MOVE a photo that's referenced by a live page. COPY it to /used/ for tracking, or just log usage in PHOTO_USAGE_LOG.md without moving.
